examples: He was attempting to manufacture quinine from aniline, an inexpensive and readily available coal tar waste product.
Incorporating potassium dichromate and alcohol into the aniline at various stages of the experimental process, he finally produced a deep purple solution.
Chlorine is introduced into the ortho-position of aniline.
So as he had done previously, he picked himself up and worked odd jobs, including one for which he used aniline dyes to paint the undergarments on a live model.
